comparative_note: Cloze format is out of jurisdiction (owner rule 2026-07-24); judging the passage only. "Analogue Comforts" reads as a genuine BrE society-and-culture column: opens on a quoted, dryly-voiced persona (Priya Mehta) the way real features do, carries concrete residue (a former launderette, waiting lists, publishers courting venues) and a real complication (survival despite narrow margins, curation as discipline) rather than a settled fact tidily exposed. Intellectual temperature matches the educated-adult argumentation of var-2022-1-verb1-ELF-031 (the aging-research funding argument) and the narrative density of host-2021-verb2-ELF-040 (the Pantheon); option words sit in normal magazine register against the prose. No listicle/blog/reader-address filler and no manufactured one-claim-per-paragraph tidiness. Indistinguishable in kind from the exemplars.

Cloze format set aside per the 2026-07-24 scope rule; passage judged alone. "Fewer Fridays" reads as a real current-affairs column: a dated, particularised case (Aldermere, spring 2021, one surrendered day at full salary), audited figures with a named consultancy (Harlen & Voss, ~3%), a founder who hedges her own result (Mira Aldous), and a genuine unresolved tension about generalisability to a factory floor or hospital ward. This is the same educated-adult, complication-not-settled-fact temperature as var-2022-1-verb1-ELF-031 and the argumentative stance of host-ver2-2019-verb1-ELF-031 (Education and Pay). Concrete detail density and paraphrase-register options are in range; no blog tone, hype, or test-manufactured symmetry. A pass.

Judging passage register only (cloze format out of jurisdiction). "Worth Mending" is magazine-grade economics-columnist prose with a byline (Cornelius Rooth): it opens on a real-world observation, supplies particulars (the Rundgang platform, a 2021 audit, 1.4 million garments, economist Petra Almen, two of six platforms sliding into the red), and turns the upbeat case against itself with a sober counterpoint ("a thin seam of high-value goods", "the ledger reads more soberly than the headlines promise"). The tension-plus-particulars quality matches host-2021-verb2-ELF-040 and var-2022-1-verb1-ELF-031; the register is that of a real weekly, not a listicle or content-filler. Options are in paraphrase register against the prose. Indistinguishable in kind from the exemplars; pass.
